final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese annotated infographic of traditional Chinese ethnic minority costume.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel / historical costume atlas / cultural heritage infographic; photorealistic central figure or object; silk-paper / aged parchment texture background in off-white, raw silk white, or pale tea color; restrained, scholarly, collectible aesthetic
Composition: full vertical layout — top: Chinese main title + subtitle + introductory caption; left zone: structural exploded-view with Chinese leader-line annotations and close-up detail insets; upper-right zone: material / craft / texture swatches with Chinese descriptions; mid-right zone: color palette swatches + pattern samples + cultural meaning text in Chinese; bottom zone: dressing-sequence flowchart + core characteristics summary panel; central focus: full-body standing figure (photorealistic) or central object exploded diagram depending on subject
Subject: a representative Chinese ethnic minority costume system — subject, garment system, component parts, era style, key structural elements, material craft, and color scheme all self-determined to best represent 中国少数民族服饰
Scene/backdrop: flat museum-panel background with silk-paper / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 parchment texture; no photographic environment, no gradient wash
Lighting/mood: even diffused light, no dramatic shadows; clinical and archival in tone
Color palette: derived from the chosen ethnic costume's authentic palette; background restricted to off-white / raw silk / pale tea tones; ink-black for annotation lines and Chinese text
Materials/textures: visible fabric texture swatches showing real weave, embroidery, brocade, or dye patterns; material sample tiles in upper-right zone
Text (verbatim): 中国少数民族服饰图鉴
Constraints: all body text, labels, annotations, titles, captions, and flowchart nodes must be simplified Chinese characters — no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters, no typos; annotation leader lines must connect accurately to correct garment parts; text must be legible and well-spaced
Avoid: poster aesthetic, portrait-studio feel, e-commerce product page feel, anime or illustration style, cosplay feel, misaligned annotations, structurally incorrect garment depiction, blurry or illegible text, fake or generic textures, excessive decorative ornamentation
